description: A scored hygiene audit conducted on a supplier as part of the material-type qualification (axiom A18). The auditor scores approximately seven areas on a 0-3 scale; the averageScore determines the outcome: APPROVED (average >= 1.5, supplier may reach QUALIFIED), PRE_QUALIFIED (average 1.0 to < 1.5, gated conditional approval), or REJECTED (average < 1.0). The record is the ISO 8.4.1 / HACCP evidence the qualification package holds. One audit record per qualification event; repeat audits create new records.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Audit ID
fields.purpose: Stable surrogate key for the audit record; referenced by the SupplierQualification record and retained as the ISO 8.4.1 qualification evidence.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: must reference an existing Supplier; immutable
fields.purpose: Identifies which supplier was audited; links back to the Supplier master and the SupplierQualification record.

fields.name: auditDate
fields.label: Audit Date
fields.validation: <= today; the date the physical or documentary audit was conducted
fields.purpose: The date the audit was performed; drives the re-audit cadence and the next-due date, and establishes the currency of the qualification evidence.

fields.name: auditorId
fields.label: Auditor
fields.validation: must reference an active User in the Quality or Tax/Compliance role
fields.purpose: Records who conducted the audit for accountability and re-audit scheduling; retained as the ISO 8.4.1 authorizing-person record.

fields.name: areaScores
fields.label: Area Scores
fields.validation: JSON object with approximately 7 scored areas; each area carries a score 0-3 (0 = non-compliant, 1 = partial, 2 = mostly compliant, 3 = fully compliant); example areas: housekeeping, pest-control, water-sanitation, personnel-hygiene, equipment-cleaning, waste-management, documentation; additional areas configurable per material type; all areas mandatory when the audit is submitted
fields.purpose: The granular scored evidence of the supplier's hygiene posture; individual area scores enable the buyer and Quality to identify specific non-compliant areas and set targeted CAPA requirements rather than relying on a single pass-fail.

fields.name: averageScore
fields.label: Average Score
fields.validation: computed from areaScores; 0.0 to 3.0; two decimal places; threshold logic: >= 1.5 -> APPROVED; 1.0 to < 1.5 -> PRE_QUALIFIED; < 1.0 -> REJECTED
fields.purpose: The single summary figure that determines the qualification outcome; computed by the platform so the threshold rules in axiom A18 are applied consistently without manual calculation.

fields.name: outcome
fields.label: Audit Outcome
fields.validation: derived from averageScore: APPROVED if >= 1.5; PRE_QUALIFIED if 1.0 to < 1.5; REJECTED if < 1.0; immutable once set
fields.computedFormula: averageScore >= 1.5 -> APPROVED; averageScore >= 1.0 -> PRE_QUALIFIED; else REJECTED
fields.purpose: The threshold-driven qualification outcome that feeds the SupplierQualification.status; APPROVED allows QUALIFIED; PRE_QUALIFIED allows PRE_QUALIFIED (gated); REJECTED blocks ONBOARDED for this material type (axiom A18).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Audit Record Status
fields.validation: DRAFT while being filled in; SUBMITTED once the auditor finalizes; SUPERSEDED when a newer audit is submitted for the same supplier (the older record is retained for history)
fields.purpose: Tracks whether the audit is in progress, finalized, or superseded by a newer assessment; only a SUBMITTED audit can feed the SupplierQualification outcome; SUPERSEDED records are retained for the audit trail.

invariants: A18 averageScore >= 1.5 -> APPROVED (supplier may reach QUALIFIED); 1.0 to < 1.5 -> PRE_QUALIFIED (gated); < 1.0 -> REJECTED (blocks ONBOARDED for this material type)
A13 audit record finalization is audited and broadcast
outcome is computed from averageScore and is immutable once the record is SUBMITTED
